---
title: Induction
subtitle: <Subtitle>
date: today
---

::: hidden
\newcommand{\type}[1]{\mathsf{#1}}
\newcommand{\term}[1]{\operatorname{\mathsf{#1}}}

\newcommand{\tpt}[2]{\term{transport}({#1,#2})}

\newcommand{\tp}[1]{{#1}_{\ast}}

\newcommand{\yo}{\mathop{よ}}

\newcommand{\defeq}{\stackrel{\triangle}{=}}

\require{bussproofs}
:::






::: {#def-induction-principle}
Given a type $T$ with constructors $C_0,\ldots,C_n$, the *induction principle* or *dependent eliminator* $\term{ind}_T$
:::








::: {#def-path-induction}
$$
    \begin{prooftree}
        \AxiomC{B}
        \UnaryInfC{A}
    \end{prooftree}
$$

:::



::: {#def-funext}
$$
\begin{align*}
    \term{funext}:\{A,B:\mathcal{U}\}\rightarrow\{f,g:A\rightarrow B\}\rightarrow\bigl((x:A)\rightarrow f(x)=_{B(x)}g(x)\bigr)\rightarrow f=_{(x:A)\rightarrow B(x)}g
\end{align*}
$$
:::
